chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. D – 394 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 1. For orders on MA No.2942/2019 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case (Notice issued) 18.09.2019 None present since beginning. Apparently, applicant is no more interested. Now, it is 11:00 a.m. Dismissed on account of non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
